headline: RS' Q1 Earnings and Sales Surpass Estimates on Higher Prices
summary: Reliance beats Q1 estimates as higher prices lift earnings and sales, and strong demand across key markets support its upbeat second-quarter outlook.

headline: NEM's Q1 Earnings and Sales Trounce Estimates on Higher Gold Prices
summary: Newmont beats Q1 earnings and revenue estimates as soaring gold prices drive strong year-over-year growth despite lower production.

headline: Air Products to Build, Own and Operate New Air Separation Unit in Florida
summary: Air Products (NYSE:APD), a world-leading industrial gas supplier, today announced plans to build, own and operate a new air separation unit (ASU) in the City of Cocoa, Florida. The ASU will produce liquid oxygen, nitrogen and argon. The plant is targeted to be on stream in the second half of 2028.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Air Products, Raises Price Target to $338
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Arun Viswanathan   maintains Air Products (NYSE:APD) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $325 to $338.
